plans.name: Starter
plans.description: Payments and procurement for growing teams — up to 10 users

modules.name: Avrentis Payables
modules.description: Payment voucher creation, digital signatures, bank-ready PDF output, and payment status tracking. Approvals run on the Avrentis Authority engine; final money movement is handed off to a licensed bank.

modules.name: Avrentis Procurement
modules.description: Purchase order generation, vendor/supplier directory, quotation and invoice tracking. PO approvals run on the Avrentis Authority engine.

modules.name: Avrentis Records
modules.description: A unified record of your vouchers and purchase orders — supporting attachments and full submission version history in one place.

plans.name: Business
plans.description: Complete operations with compliance and analytics — up to 50 users

modules.name: Avrentis Payables
modules.description: Payment voucher creation, digital signatures, bank-ready PDF output, and payment status tracking. Approvals run on the Avrentis Authority engine; final money movement is handed off to a licensed bank.

modules.name: Avrentis Procurement
modules.description: Purchase order generation, vendor/supplier directory, quotation and invoice tracking. PO approvals run on the Avrentis Authority engine.

modules.name: Avrentis Records
modules.description: A unified record of your vouchers and purchase orders — supporting attachments and full submission version history in one place.

modules.name: Avrentis Guard
modules.description: Real-time fraud and anomaly detection across the approval workflow — duplicate payments, vendor bank-detail changes, threshold gaming, and separation-of-duties breaches surfaced as review flags.

modules.name: Avrentis Grants
modules.description: Donor grant and restricted-fund tracking — allocate budgets per grant and tag spend against them for donor-ready reporting.

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.description: Unlimited scale, dedicated support, and full platform access

modules.name: Avrentis Payables
modules.description: Payment voucher creation, digital signatures, bank-ready PDF output, and payment status tracking. Approvals run on the Avrentis Authority engine; final money movement is handed off to a licensed bank.

modules.name: Avrentis Procurement
modules.description: Purchase order generation, vendor/supplier directory, quotation and invoice tracking. PO approvals run on the Avrentis Authority engine.

modules.name: Avrentis Records
modules.description: A unified record of your vouchers and purchase orders — supporting attachments and full submission version history in one place.

modules.name: Avrentis Requests
modules.description: Employee leave and expense requests — routed through the same approval engine and audit trail as the Payables and Procurement modules. Deliberately NOT an HR suite (no payroll / core-HR records); it adds employee-initiated request types to the Delegation-of-Authority workflow.

modules.name: Avrentis Guard
modules.description: Real-time fraud and anomaly detection across the approval workflow — duplicate payments, vendor bank-detail changes, threshold gaming, and separation-of-duties breaches surfaced as review flags.

modules.name: Avrentis Grants
modules.description: Donor grant and restricted-fund tracking — allocate budgets per grant and tag spend against them for donor-ready reporting.

platformModules.name: Avrentis Authority
platformModules.description: The delegation-of-authority engine every approval runs on — define who can approve what, up to how much, under which conditions; enforced automatically and provable on the immutable record.

platformModules.name: Avrentis Compliance
platformModules.description: Immutable audit trail, compliance reporting, activity timeline, DSAR handling, data-retention controls, regulatory-ready exports, SOC 2 evidence surfaces

platformModules.name: Avrentis Integrations
platformModules.description: Webhooks and typed API for accounting, HR, and data-warehouse systems; SSO authentication; bank verification; notification delivery; ERP integrations
